misc: Primary organizer of the Hector Trophée event.
biography: At the core of the Hector Trophée's enduring legacy stands Toni, a figure synonymous with the event's very existence. As the primary organizer, his dedication has sculpted this prestigious competition from its nascent stages. Hailing from Hirsala Golf, Toni possesses an unparalleled record of participation, having graced every single edition of the tournament since its inauguration in 2014, making the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026 his remarkable thirteenth appearance.

Beyond his pivotal organizational duties, Toni has consistently demonstrated his prowess on the course, transitioning seamlessly from administrator to formidable competitor. His competitive spirit is reflected in his impressive tally of three Hector Trophée victories, a testament to his strategic acumen and collaborative excellence in the pairs format.

Furthermore, Toni's individual brilliance has been recognized with two coveted Victor Trophy titles, underscoring his capability to dominate independently in a field of elite golfers. As he prepares for his record-extending thirteenth consecutive appearance, Toni remains not just the architect of the Hector Trophée, but also one of its most decorated and enduring players, perpetually striving for further accolades.
